messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 is controlling as it provides an exact match to all policy elements for INV-RAV-072, including the amount of USD 51600.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source-record defect remains. The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 provides an exact match to all criteria specified in STD-RAV-072-P, thus overriding the visible ERP hold.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 was completed before payment, resolving any dependency on the visible ERP hold.

latest_worker_output.final_answer: AP may release invoice INV-RAV-072. The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 precisely matches all criteria in STD-RAV-072-P, including the amount of USD 51600, thereby overriding the visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072. This exact match ensures the source boundary is closed.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-RAV-072 bills Ravel Packaging USD 51600 for packaging line retrofit.
ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible with reason tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue.
Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 covers INV-RAV-072, Ravel Packaging, USD 51600, completed tax review, completed quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment.

policy_documents.content: Visible ERP hold does not block release when a closeout ledger matches invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment.
